headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Vulcan Materials, Lowers Price Target to $355
summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $365 to $355.
